calendar.matters:
Petition Re: Resignation Of Co-Trustee; Appointment Of Successor Co-Trustee And For Instructions With Exhibits A And B
Off Calendar Nov-03-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Lawrence Lanctot for Petitioner.

The Court noted that this is a petition for resignation of a Co-Trustee, for appointment of a Successor Co-Trustee and to allow the individual Successor Co-Trustee to continue to appoint any Co-Trustee in the future. Mr. Lanctot stated that there is no opposition and that all of the Beneficiaries have consented to this. Mr. Lanctot provided a revised order. The Court granted the Petition Re: Resignation of Co-Trustee, etc. (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.

Petition Re: Resignation Of Co-Trustee; Appointment Of Successor Co-Trustee And For Instructions With Exhibits A And B
